name: Pussini Sushini
lore:
Lore of Pussini Sushini
                                    


Italian (Original)
Ecco a voi, Pussini Sushini, e il Legendario, Gatini Wasabini. Meow. Mrrr. Pur pur pur prrrrr, wasabi boom! Anche conosciuto come Pussini Sushini e Felinori Maki, Gnam gnam, splash, soy sauce, skrriii, Una creatura metà micetto, metà sushi, rotola per la strade facendo mrrrr crunch crunch sashimi plop, Ha il corpo di un gattino morbido, ma il dorso è fatto di riso compatto con una fettina de salmone sapra. Le sue zampe sono bastoncini di zenzero e la coda, un’alga nori che si muove da sola. Wob wob miso slap. Se lo tocchi fagnan slorp soy zing, e se lo spaventi si arrotola su se stesso come un maki pronto da mangiare. Ma attenzione se provi a mangiarlo ti lancia dagli occhi e fa f-z-z-z di wasabooo! Splosh! Nessuno sa da dove venga.
Translated (English)
Here is Pussini Sushini and the Legendary, Gatini Wasabini. Meow. Mrrr. Pur pur pur prrrrr, wasabi boom! Also known as Pussini Sushini and Felinori Maki, Yum yum, splash, soy sauce, skrriii, A creature half kitten, half sushi, rolls through the streets going mrrrr crunch crunch sashimi plop, He has the body of a soft kitten, but his back is made of compact rice with a slice of sapra salmon. His legs are ginger sticks and his tail, a nori seaweed that moves by itself. Wob wob miso slap. If you touch it, He makes slorp soy zing, and if you scare it, He rolls up on itself like a ready-to-eat maki. But be careful if you try to eat it, He throws you out of your eyes and goes f-z-z-z of wasabooo! Splosh! No one knows where it came from.
